description: User clicked on a pricing plan (Starter, PRO, or MAX) from the landing page pricing section
User initiated the Stripe checkout flow for a paid plan
User dropped a file to import transactions (conversion funnel top)
User successfully imported transactions from a file (key conversion event)
File import failed with an error (churn indicator)
User created a new transaction category in data library
User deleted a statement/report from data library (potential churn signal)
User sent a message to the AI chat assistant
User clicked a quick AI prompt chip from the dashboard
User clicked to view details of a financial health score card
User set or updated a budget limit for a spending category
User manually changed a transaction's category (engagement signal)
User toggled between monthly and annual billing on pricing page
User successfully completed Stripe checkout and subscribed to a plan (key conversion event)
User canceled Stripe checkout before completing (churn indicator)
User's subscription was updated via Stripe portal
[server] New paid subscription started (fired from Stripe webhook on checkout.session.completed) — source of truth for new paid conversions
[server] Recurring subscription cycle payment succeeded (fired from Stripe webhook on invoice.payment_succeeded with billing_reason=subscription_cycle) — source of truth for recurring revenue
[server] User upgraded, downgraded, or scheduled a plan change (fired from Stripe webhook on customer.subscription.updated) — includes direction and pending flag
[server] Subscription fully canceled / deleted in Stripe (fired from Stripe webhook on customer.subscription.deleted) — source of truth for involuntary + voluntary churn
[server] Recurring payment failed (fired from Stripe webhook on invoice.payment_failed) — includes attempt_count and next_payment_attempt for dunning analysis
[server] Full refund issued — subscription canceled and access revoked (fired from Stripe webhook on charge.refunded)
[server] One-time transaction pack purchase completed (fired from Stripe webhook on checkout.session.completed with purchase_type=transaction_pack)
